notifications.masterDescription: Receive desktop notifications for new bookings, pending deliveries, and critical alerts. Notifications contain no patient details — click to open the portal and view full information.
notifications.permissionDenied: Browser blocked notification permission. Enable in your browser site settings.
notifications.permissionBlocked: Notifications blocked by browser. Click the lock icon in the address bar and allow notifications, then refresh.
notifications.errorEnabling: Could not enable notifications. Please try again.
notifications.unsupportedDescription: Your browser does not support push notifications. Try Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari 16.4+.
notifications.eventNewBookingsDesc: When a patient submits a new online booking awaiting confirmation
notifications.eventReportsDeliveryDesc: When signed reports accumulate beyond a threshold (15+ pending)
notifications.eventCriticalDesc: When a radiologist marks a finding as critical and requires urgent administrative attention
notifications.eventSystemDesc: Backup failures, service health degradation, security events
notifications.quietHoursDescription: Notifications will be paused during these hours. Critical findings can still break through quiet hours if marked urgent.
